title: Basic Attack
description: Free basic attack card. Can be played once per turn.

title: End Turn
description: Ends active combatant turn and advances turn flow.

title: Select Forged Heritage
description: Choose one heritage branch and apply linked profile and lore tag.

title: Select Integrated Resistance
description: Choose bludgeoning, slashing, or piercing resistance source from chassis configuration.

title: Select Augmentation Slot 1
description: Choose one augmentation at level 1.

title: Select Augmentation Slot 2
description: At level 5, choose a second augmentation from list.

title: Replace Augmentation
description: At level 10, replace one prior augmentation with another list option.

title: Maintenance Check
description: On long rest, verify maintenance tools or assistance; otherwise apply degradation effect.

title: Forged Resilience Trigger
description: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, drop to 1 HP if not used this rest.

title: Vox Mimic Voice
description: Social utility card; perfectly mimic a voice heard for at least one minute.

title: Neural Accelerator Ready
description: Card version of Neural Accelerator utility.

title: Select Vein Oath
description: Choose core oath anchor.

title: Apply Resonance Fracture
description: Apply disadvantage state until atonement and meditation are completed.

title: Between Stance
description: Attack action rider: avoid opportunity attacks and impose disadvantage on first attack against you.

title: Iron Breath
description: Suppress enhancement signature for one minute; once per short rest.

title: Resonant Strike
description: Once per turn, add Wisdom modifier to qualified melee hit damage.

title: Stillness Kata
description: If you do not move, gain attack advantage this turn.

title: Burden Strike
description: Impose disadvantage on attack against nearby ally.

title: Iron Witness
description: Gain temporary HP when nearby creature drops to 0 HP.

title: Enhancement Integration
description: Integrated weapons count magical and detect enhancement tampering.

title: Between Awareness
description: Cannot be surprised while conscious; advantage on initiative.

title: Iron Endurance
description: Choose physical resistance and once per long rest drop-to-1 effect.

title: Code-Sworn Precision
description: Once per turn, treat low attack roll as 10.

title: Resonant Surge
description: Power state with speed and damage bonuses.

title: Steel Resolve
description: Immune frightened; reroll vs charm or compulsion on failure.

title: Perfect Kata
description: High-impact burst attack sequence.

title: Resonant Armor
description: Unarmored AC formula and reaction damage reduction.

title: Echomind Clarity
description: Advantage on Wisdom saves; immune to forced oath-breaking control.

title: Between Mastery
description: Dodge as bonus action and surge upgrades.

title: Blade-Sworn
description: Weapon return, anti-disarm, incorporeal strike support.

title: The Seventh Vein
description: Capstone package with surge and death-action effects.

title: Lord's Resonance
description: Social advantage and ward-linked bonus damage.

title: Iron Vanguard
description: Reaction movement to interpose and become target instead of ward.

title: Code of the House
description: Anti-retreat resistance and ward protection extension.

title: Unbroken Fealty
description: Transfer HP to ward when they drop to 0 HP.

title: Sutra's Edge
description: Iron Rite and anti-reanimation effects.

title: Theological Authority
description: Religion expertise and once-per-long-rest pacification invocation.

title: Between Consecration
description: Consecrate area with anti-undead pressure and ally support.

title: The Final Sutra
description: Soul-bind finishing effect.

title: Debt's Memory
description: Mark debt targets and gain bonuses.

title: Hollow Memory
description: Meditative memory-construction consultation.

title: Unfinished Business
description: Temporary death-defiance state.

title: The Debt Becomes the Blade
description: High-damage debt finisher.

title: Temple Form
description: Choose Water, Fire, or Iron form.

title: Spiritual Violence
description: Bonus damage and sustain on takedown.

title: Perfect Instrument
description: Max HP and save profile upgrades.

title: The Temple Burns
description: Overdrive state with backlash.
